description_long: This is a single low-cut athletic shoe, predominantly yellow with a blue Asics stripe design along the sides and an orange heel collar. The shoe features white laces in a standard criss-cross pattern and a red and white label on the tongue. The upper material appears to be synthetic leather or coated fabric, showing visible signs of wear, dirt, and some scuff marks, especially around the toe and sole. The sole is thin and fitted with metal spikes, indicating it is a track or running shoe, and the tread is mostly smooth with some dirt embedded. There is a visible signature or writing on the toe area, suggesting it may have some collectible or personal significance.
description: A yellow and blue Asics track shoe with white laces, orange collar, and metal spikes, showing visible wear and dirt.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue Asics stripes, orange heel, and signature on the toe.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the white laces, red tongue label, and visible toe wear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with blue stripes, orange collar, and dirt on the sole.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the orange heel collar and the back of the shoe.
attribute_logo: Red and white rectangular label on the tongue, blue Asics stripes on the sides.
